name: Student event Celebration
script: , Trigger: After Save , Doctype: Parent Meeting if doc.student\_group: , Step 1: Get students from the selected Student Group student\_group = frappe.get\_doc("Student Group", doc.student\_group) student\_ids = [s.student for s in student\_group.students] , Step 2: Find Guardians linked to those students guardian\_emails = set() , Get all guardians whose Guardian Student child table has matching student guardians = frappe.get\_all("Guardian", fields=["name", "email\_address"]) for guardian in guardians: guardian\_doc = frappe.get\_doc("Guardian", guardian.name) for gs in guardian\_doc.students: , this is the Guardian Student child table if gs.student in student\_ids and guardian\_doc.email\_address: guardian\_emails.add(guardian\_doc.email\_address) , Step 3: Compose email subject = f"Event from Bizaxl school" message = f"""   Parent Invitation        #,  {doc.subject}   Dear Parent,, ,  You are invited to attend an important event scheduled for your child enrolled in group **{doc.student\_group}**.  |  Date: | {doc.date} | | --- | --- | | ⏰ Time: | {doc.time} | |  Venue: | {doc.venue} |    Agenda:  {doc.agenda}     We look forward to seeing you there!   Let's make this event memorable together!      """ , Step 4: Send email to all unique guardian emails if guardian\_emails: frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(guardian\_emails), subject=subject, message=message )
